message:
Buy your cat an expensive new bed, and what do they choose instead? The cardboard box it came in. 📦😹 It's the oldest joke in cat ownership — "if I fits, I sits" — but there's real science behind the obsession.

For a cat, an enclosed box is the ultimate safe space. In the wild, cats are both hunters AND prey, so a snug hideaway where they can watch the world without being seen helps them feel protected and in control. One study at an animal shelter even found that cats given boxes settled in faster and showed noticeably less stress than cats without them. On top of that, cardboard is a cozy insulator, so a box traps all that toasty warmth cats adore.

So that humble box isn't clutter to your cat — it's a fortress, a hunting blind, and a warm little retreat all in one. 💛

What's the most ridiculous container YOUR cat has decided to squeeze into? I need photos in the comments. 📦🐾
